items.title_en: SoftBank posts $46 billion gain at Vision Fund driven mainly by massive OpenAI bet
items.title_zh: 软银愿景基金收益 460 亿美元，主要得益于 OpenAI 的大规模押注
items.desc_en: SoftBank booked a yearly gain of $46 billion at its Vision Fund driven in large part by the huge rise in value of its investment in OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: 软银其愿景基金的年收益为 460 亿美元，这在很大程度上是由于其对 OpenAI 的投资价值大幅上涨所致。

items.desc_zh: 预计欧洲股市周三高开，将克服周二交易日的负面情绪。

items.title_zh: 以下是 2026 年 4 月的通胀明细——在一张图表中
items.desc_en: The Iran war has pushed up gasoline, groceries and other prices for consumers.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗战争推高了汽油、杂货和其他消费者的价格。

items.title_en: It's not just Iran and oil raising inflation. Prices also are reaccelerating in these other areas
items.title_zh: 导致通货膨胀的不仅仅是伊朗和石油。其他地区的价格也在加速上涨
items.desc_en: Here's some of the places where prices are rising fast for consumers.
items.desc_zh: 以下是一些对消费者来说价格快速上涨的地方。

items.title_en: eBay rejects $55.5bn offer from GameStop
items.title_zh: eBay 拒绝 GameStop 555 亿美元的收购要约
items.desc_en: The online auction giant said it doubted how the video game retailer would finance its offer.
items.desc_zh: 这家在线拍卖巨头表示，它对视频游戏零售商如何为其报价提供资金表示怀疑。

items.title_en: Kuwait accuses Iran of sending armed Revolutionary Guard team in failed island attack - ynetnews
items.title_zh: 科威特指责伊朗派遣武装革命卫队参与未遂的岛屿袭击 - ynetnews
items.desc_en: Kuwait accuses Iran of sending armed Revolutionary Guard team in failed island attack  ynetnewsKuwait Accuses Iran of Trying to Infiltrate Its Territory  The New York TimesKuwait says it foiled infilt
items.desc_zh: 科威特指责伊朗派遣武装革命卫队参与未遂岛屿袭击 科威特指责伊朗试图渗透其领土 纽约时报科威特称其挫败了渗透

items.title_en: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term
items.title_zh: 乌干达总统宣誓就职，创历史第七个任期
items.desc_en: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.
items.desc_zh: 81 岁的约韦里·穆塞韦尼 (Yoweri Museveni) 在 1 月份赢得了有争议的选举，延长了他 40 年的统治。

items.title_en: EU needs to delay social media access for children - von der Leyen
items.title_zh: 冯德莱恩：欧盟需要推迟儿童使用社交媒体的时间
items.desc_en: She told an EU summit that an expert panel was due to come up with steps on how to protect minors online by July.
items.desc_zh: 她在一次欧盟峰会上表示，专家小组将于 7 月份就如何保护未成年人上网制定措施。

items.title_en: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
items.title_zh: Canvas 黑客：公司付钱给犯罪分子，让他们删除学生被盗的数据
items.desc_en: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.title_en: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州指控 Netflix 监视用户，包括儿童
items.desc_en: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.
items.desc_zh: 此次诉讼发生之际，人们对自动播放等向用户提供无尽内容的平台功能进行了越来越严格的审查。

items.title_en: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
items.title_zh: 联合国卫生机构称，没有迹象表明存在更大规模的汉坦病毒爆发
items.desc_en: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.
items.desc_zh: 世界卫生组织负责人警告说，情况仍可能发生变化，可能会出现更多确诊病例。

items.title_en: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking
items.title_zh: 不那么尘土飞扬：科技如何改变木工
items.desc_en: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.
items.desc_zh: 木工车间已经被技术改造，使工具更安全、更精确。

items.title_zh: TikTok 在美国因出现荒谬错误而收回人工智能视频描述
items.desc_en: While only rolled out to some TikTok users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.
items.desc_zh: 虽然仅向部分 TikTok 用户推出，但该功能由人工智能生成的奇异描述却被广泛分享。

items.title_en: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today- what does this mean for your DMs?
items.title_zh: Instagram 隐私技术今天关闭 - 这对您的私信意味着什么？
items.desc_en: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.
items.desc_zh: 该平台表示将删除端到端加密消息，这是母公司 Meta 的一个重大转变。

items.title_en: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
items.title_zh: 晒伤如何激发了一种储存能量的新方法
items.desc_en: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.
items.desc_zh: 能够捕获热量的分子可能是一种有用的供暖脱碳技术。

items.title_en: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
items.title_zh: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
items.desc_en: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.
items.desc_zh: Meta表示Ofcom的计算“不成比例”； the regulator said it would defend its position.

items.title_zh: 观看：无人机在英国运送第一批亚马逊包裹
items.desc_en: The tech giant says it hopes to slowly expand the service as the demand for ultra-fast deliveries grows.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，随着对超快速交付的需求的增长，它希望慢慢扩大这项服务。
